layout_strategy.spacing: Extremely generous. Use py-24 to py-32 for section vertical padding to allow the design to breathe.
layout_strategy.alignment: Optical alignment. Center text for hero and poetic statements. Left-align for complex data like menus and forms.
layout_strategy.borders: Use border-white/10 (1px solid) to create elegant, barely-there separation between sections or cards.

header.style: Fixed to top. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 border-b border-white/10.
header.logo: Text logo using Playfair Display font. The text should read 'L\'ÉTOILE' or a similar elegant name, colored in gold (#D4AF37).

hero.style: Full viewport height (h-screen). Absolute positioned hero_image covering the entire background.
hero.content: Centered. Overline text 'A Culinary Journey'. H1 text 'A Symphony of Flavors'. Gold CTA Button 'Reserve a Table'.

about_us.layout: 2-column grid (lg:grid-cols-2). Left side: about_image with a soft shadow and rounded corners (max rounded-sm). Right side: Text block with H2, descriptive paragraphs, and a script-style signature if possible.

services.card_style: Flat #141414 background, 1px border-white/10. Inside: Gold Lucide icon, H3 title, soft gray description.

menu_prices.item_style: Flex container with 'justify-between' for Item Name and Price. A dotted line or just generous spacing between them. The description goes below the name in text-sm text-[#A3A3A3].

gallery.layout: CSS Grid masonry or varying col-span. 4 images minimal gap. E.g., md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. One image can span 2 rows for asymmetry.

contact.layout: Split layout. Left: Contact details (Phone, Address, Hours). Right: Minimalist Contact Form.
contact.form_style: Shadcn Inputs with bg-transparent, border-b only or border-white/10. No thick white borders.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Inject Google Fonts 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' in index.html and configure Tailwind to use them as 'font-serif' and 'font-sans'.
Do NOT use pure #000000; use the specific #0A0A0A from colors.
Make all buttons square or minimally rounded (rounded-none or rounded-sm) to match luxury feel. No pill-shaped buttons unless it's a specific badge.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs).
Do not use generic placeholder images. Use only the provided 'media_urls'.
The restaurant needs an SEO text section. Incorporate rich, descriptive content about fine dining, organic ingredients, and luxury ambiance in the About or Services sections.
Do not render Shadcn Card components with their default white background. Override backgrounds to #141414 and borders to border-white/10.
